XOnlineGetSession

Returns the session information for the current title.

HRESULT XOnlineGetSession(
    XNADDR *pxnaddr,
    XNKID *pxnkid,
    XNKEY *pxnkey
);

Parameters

pxnaddr

[out] Pointer to an XNADDR variable that receives the title's Xbox network address.

pxnkid

[out] Pointer to an XNKID variable that receives the session ID.

pxnkey

[out] Pointer to an XNKEY variable that receives the key-exchange key for the session.

Return Values

Returns S_OK if successful, an error code otherwise.

Remarks

This function returns the session ID and key-exchange key which are set by calling XOnlineNotificationSetState.

Titles should use the XOnlineGetSession function to obtain session information for an Xbox Live game session that they do not intend to advertise using the Xbox Live matchmaking service. Other Xbox consoles that wish to join this game session should use the XOnlineGetUserSession function to obtain the session information.

Use the returned XNKID and XNKEY with the XNetRegisterKey function to register a secure networking session.

Requirements

Header: Declared in Xonline.h.

Import Library: Use Xonline.lib.

See Also

Xbox Live Functions | XOnlineGetUserSession
